headline: A US government export-control directive forced Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 across all customers within days of release.
body: The Fable 5 and Mythos 5 shutdown dominated the quarter, with reports tying the directive to jailbreak and export concerns and tracking knock-on bans across Europe. Beneath the news, technique rotation centered on agent persistence and tooling: multi-session workflows led the movers, and MCP, design systems, knowledge graphs, Obsidian vault, and on-disk indexing all entered as new technique outliers, reflecting work on self-improving knowledge bases and design-system-aware AI agents. Inference speed surfaced as a parallel thread, with Xiaomi's MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed and Google's DiffusionGemma both claiming over 1,000 tokens per second via speculative decoding, FP4 quantization, and diffusion-based text generation.

cited_items.title: Build a Hermes Knowledge Base That Self-Improves
Is This The FASTEST AI Model In The World?!! (Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed)
